articles.title: Kurs TRY/PLN 17 kwietnia 2026 r.
articles.summary: Lira to jedna z walut, której kurs ulega w ostatnich latach największym zmianom. Poznaj bieżący kurs tureckiej waluty (TRY). Przedstawiamy zmianę notowań w ujęciu tygodniowym, a także dziennym.

articles.title: Próby zamachów na Sama Altmana. "AI unicestwi ludzkość"
articles.summary: Istnieje na świecie grupa, która twierdzi, że AI wkrótce wymknie się spod kontroli. Są gotowi zabić, bo według nich w ten sposób ratują ludzkość.

articles.title: Former Treasury Secretary Henry Paulson warns U.S. needs an emergency ‘break-the-glass’ plan if Treasury demand collapses
articles.summary: Former Treasury Secretary Henry Paulson on Thursday urged U.S. policymakers to prepare an emergency plan in case demand for Treasurys breaks down — warning that a crisis in the government bond market could trigger severe consequences across the economy.

articles.title: Jury finds that Live Nation is an illegal monopoly, but a breakup with Ticketmaster is unlikely, analysts say
articles.summary: Some analysts say the most likely outcome for Live Nation would be more damages and penalties. Shares of the concert-ticketing giant rose on Thursday after falling a day earlier.

articles.title: 2 expensive mistakes most retirees make — and how to avoid them
articles.summary: “We call them ‘King Tut’ subjects — they’re buried with their gold.”

articles.title: Netflix stock sinks after streamer reiterates guidance, says Reed Hastings to exit board
articles.summary: Netflix beat expectations for Q1 revenue and reported a big jump in earnings per share thanks in part to a termination fee related to its proposed WBD deal.

articles.title: Netflix co-founder Reed Hastings to exit company, saying it’s so strong it doesn’t need him anymore
articles.summary: The announcement came as Netflix reported first-quarter profits that shattered expectations, which it attributed in large part to faster-than-forecast subscriber growth, a recent price increase and the $2.8 billion breakup fee it received when its deal to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery collapsed.
